reviews.text: Aiden has been fantastic to work with. He's been doing an awesome job optimising my website and Google Business Profile. He goes above and beyond, putting in extra work to ensure everything is properly setup. He is very quick to respond to emails and messages and makes me feel very well looked after. Thanks again to Aiden and the Hurricane team!

Nash has recently taken over my online campaign for my business that was previously being managed into bankruptcy. He has done such an amazing job, quite quickly, of getting us back on Google where we can actually be seen/found. I am back to getting calls & email inquiries more often & am looking forward to things to keep improving & getting back to being “busy”. Thanks Nash & the team at Hurricane for building me a new fantastic website & hopefully saving my 15 year old small business.

Nash has been absolutely fantastic to work with. He’s helped our business significantly improve our Google rankings, streamline our online systems, and enhance our website’s overall performance. After switching from another company, the difference has been clear the value Hurricane Digital and Nash provide more than justifies the investment. Highly recommend. Thanks for your hard work, Nash!

Aiden has helped with SEO, Google Ads and website builds across two of my businesses, and the results have been excellent. He understands performance marketing properly and focuses on what actually drives leads and growth. Clear communication, solid strategy and quality execution. Highly recommend.

I rarely leave negative reviews, but I feel it’s important to share my experience.

During the sales process, I was given very clear expectations about the work that would be done on my Google profile and the results I could expect. Unfortunately, those expectations have not been met. After spending over $5,000, I have not seen any measurable return, enquiries, or leads that I can attribute to their services.

When I raised these concerns and asked to cancel, the response was disappointing. The process has been difficult, communication has not been proactive, and billing has continued after notice of my intent to cancel.

I would strongly recommend that anyone considering this company ensure all deliverables are clearly documented and regularly reviewed. Marketing should be an investment that generates results — that has not been my experience here.

Aiden at Hurricane Digital has been great to work with. Super easy to communicate with, quick to respond and always reaching out with new ideas on how we can improve and target different areas/services with our SEO. Would definitely recommend Hurricane Digital

Really happy with the team at Hurricane Digital. Aiden’s been awesome to deal with super helpful, easy to talk to always there ready to help and always on top of things. They truely care about helping small businesses grow!

Absolutely amazing service from the team at Hurricane! They’ve transformed our website’s performance and Google listing — the improvement has been unbelievable. A huge shout-out to Aiden Hunter, who has been incredible throughout the process. He’s worked tirelessly to create an outstanding online presence for us.

Aiden has been a great support to my plumbing business. He is always punctual, professional, and takes the time to address every concern I raise. I value his clear communication and the way he explains SEO in a way that’s easy to understand. Since working with him, I’ve seen noticeable improvements online, and I appreciate his reliable and results-driven approach.

Very very impressed with Hurricane Digital.  In a sea of marketing companies it is difficult to know who to choose when looking for a reputable company to do the right thing and help our business grow.  I found Hurricane and immediately was impressed from the first contact.  I have since been working with Aiden and have found him to be brilliant in this space.  Always offering to help and do more, and I really appreciate that.  The results are great and I am looking forward to working alongside hurricane as we grow our business further!  Thanks guys, very happy with your company and would definitely recommend you to other business owners.

Aiden and the crew at Hurricane have been fantastic in getting us new leads, a new website designed and over all more exposure. The phones are ringing and customers are coming to us. Thank you for all the hard work so far.
John at Hurricane Digital is professional, responsive, and results-driven. He quickly boosted my online presence and genuinely cares about client success. Highly recommended.

Aiden and the Hurricane Digital team are incredible! They’re a fantastic partner who truly complement my business, delivering outstanding, responsive service every time. Super easy to work with, absolute pros at what they do, and their expertise is second to none. They’ve been a real game-changer for my business!

I can't say enough good things about my experience with Hurricane Digital! From the very beginning, Aidan has been absolutely amazing. He has consistently gone above and beyond to be supportive and helpful throughout the entire process.

Aidan's knowledge and dedication make working with him a pleasure. He takes the time to understand my needs and provides tailored solutions that truly reflect my goals. The team's professionalism and attention to detail have made a significant difference in the quality of my brand.

If you're looking for a company that genuinely cares about its clients and delivers excellent results, I highly recommend Hurricane Digital. Thank you, Aidan, for your outstanding support!

Hurricane digital is an amazing company they are professional and reliable.
Deanne is lovely to work with she has helped out so much i am appreciative of her efforts and look forward to our journey together.

Our first month with Hurricane Digital has been awesome. Darpan, our account manager, has been onto details and connection points that we are learning are super important to getting the visibility we need to attract new customers! We can’t wait to see the outcomes we are working towards!!!

Hurricane has been a game-changer for our business! In just 6 months we’ve seen huge growth in calls, website traffic, and enquiries. Aiden is fantastic — clear, helpful, and always keeping us in the loop with reports and advice. Highly recommend!
Nash has done a great job with my tech stuff he is enthusiastic and puts the extra effort in .

Aiden has been great to work with. Had a lot of troubles with getting a profile live from suspensions prior, and he managed to get it live, active and optimised. I've noticed a huge influx of work and couldn't be happier with Hurricane Digital & Aiden.

Thanks again team

I recently worked with Hurricane digital for my marketing. Aiden was my account manager and was brilliant throughout the entire process. If I needed to email or ask a question on the weekend or after hours I would often receive a reply. Almost unheard of from any other agency.

I wanted to take the time to thank Hurricane Digital for their amazing work. From the very beginning, Ainslee has been nothing but helpful. No matter how many requests I come up with, she always ensures to turn my vision into reality. Thank you for your transparent work, and helpful tips. Thank you to Josh and his amazing team, your prompt responses and speedy work ensure that my website is always up to date. I will continue to work closely with the team at Hurricane Digital as we continue to increase our bookings and our brand gets more exposure.

I've had a fantastic experience working with Davinder at Hurricane Digital. From start to finish, the communication was clear, prompt, and professional. Davinder made sure I was always updated on progress, and his dedication to providing high-quality service really stood out. It’s rare to find someone who’s not only technically skilled but also genuinely invested in their clients’ success. I highly recommend Hurricane Digital and Davinder for anyone looking for reliable and results-driven service. Thanks again for all your hard work!

Davinder at Hurricane Digital is a very polite, passionate person and has amazing communication skills. He always keeps me updated and informed about the best steps to take to grow my business online. Hats off to Davinder. Keep up the good work. :-)

Told me I had one person visit my website in the last month !
Then when I looked today proved to be very wrong !
Really disappointing thought the guy was being genuine ! Very sad !
Why people do this to people I just don’t get it !

Would highly recommend

I've been using Hurricane Digital for roughly 6 months now. And in the time I have been dealing with them. They have increased my online presence immensely. George has been a stand out going above and beyond to meet our expectations. Thanks guys.

Beware of Hurricane Digital – Empty Promises and Minimal Effort ⚠️

At first, Hurricane Digital comes across as friendly and accommodating, even stating that if financial or health issues arise, they’d be willing to work with us, possibly even terminating the contract if needed. However, once you’re locked in, they will do everything they can to avoid letting you out. We’ve recently hit a rough financial patch, and instead of offering real assistance, they placed our contract on a three-month “pause”—only to turn around and charge us $150 per month during the pause, which they refuse to waive!

Beyond that, their actual service is extremely disappointing. After eight months, we have zero leads, no noticeable improvement in rankings, and we’re nowhere to be found on Google’s first page. Their blog posts are pure AI-generated content, lacking any real effort or originality. To make matters worse, they outsourced our website build, and the result was riddled with spelling mistakes and an overall clunky, unpolished experience.

If you’re looking for real digital marketing results, I highly recommend looking elsewhere. Hurricane Digital overpromises and underdelivers.

We have been working will Hurricane for almost a year now, and they reached out to supply a 5 star which of course I had no problem doing. Basically was just going to say yeah great service, but I can see some 1 star reviews – it’s not at all a reflection of what my experience has been with the company. I’ve dealt with the reception, billing sales and my account manager Davi and all of them have been super helpful. You can see it’s a team that wants to help you, and you can see it’s a local team in Brisbane. I suppose it’s different for everyone, I can’t speak for others, but my experience has been all positive, and I would highly recommend.

I’ve worked closely with Darpan from hurricane he has been a huge help with the starting process, has taken the time to go through things 1 on 1 to bring me upto speed and educate me. Can’t be happier !

Public notice
Beware do not use this company the use lies and tactics to pull you into a 12 month contract at a ridiculous price with nothing being done. They only post ai generated updates. They got my gmb account disabled because they violated Google’s terms and conditions by displaying my home address as a service based business. They said my competitors done something to get my account disabled and they had 3 failed attempts to recover my account or even know what they have done wrong. They also said to give up on my account and establish a new one after spending 10s of thousands of dollars and losing all my reviews and ranking.They never own upto their mistakes and always make ridiculous excuses. I got a real marketing agency to retrieve my account and fix their mistakes then they tried to take ownership of my account after i had it recovered.
I don’t want to hear the reply that is full of lies and justification to your lack of knowledge
These guy helped me and my business grow rapidly. Aiden is amazing at what he does. Couldn’t recommend them highly enough.

Walter provided me with an excellent run down of what Hurricane Digital can offer my business as an electrical contractor. He took the time to explain all the excellent befits the company can offer me. I would definitely consider using them in the near future….
A fantastic team. Really open to my ideas. I'm doing a 3 month starter plan and am excited to see the results 😀

Hurricane Digital are awesome. Been with them for just over a month now and cannot complain - great management of my profile and results speak for themselves!

After a year we have had about 4 new job contacts, thats all. The seo engagement was misdirected and i was upsold a website that looked like it was outsourced to fivrr or india. When they delivered 3 sub par designs they then asked me to link them to a website to rip off.

They also refuse any sort of refund for under performance. Contact was terrible. And they were also unwilling to work with us on an out of the blue business restructure that took us months to get across.

Avoid Hurricane Digital SEO Brisbane – A Costly and Frustrating Experience.

My experience with Hurricane Digital SEO Brisbane has been nothing short of a financial and emotional nightmare. After investing over $12,000 in their SEO services over several years, I received absolutely no improvement in my website rankings. Despite my repeated concerns and complaints, I was continuously told that I was locked into a contract, leaving me with no option but to involve my bank to prevent further charges.
To verify my suspicions, I hired an independent SEO auditor who provided undeniable evidence that no real SEO work had been done. Hurricane Digital had promised high-quality backlinks, but instead, they delivered spammy links that negatively impacted my rankings. Even after years of supposed SEO services, my Domain Authority and Domain Rating remained stagnant at 0.70—clear proof that I was being misled.

When I informed them of my intent to pursue legal action through QCAT for a full refund, they attempted to justify their work by claiming I had only signed up for Google My Business (Google Maps) SEO. At no point was this limitation explained to me, nor was it outlined in my contract. Industry professionals, including my SEO auditor, confirmed that optimizing a Google My Business listing in the way they claimed is unnecessary, as Google provides these listings for free and they do not require SEO. It was shocking to see Hurricane Digital use this as an excuse to avoid refunding my money.

To make matters worse, even after blocking them from withdrawing more funds, I was bombarded with emails demanding payment for ongoing fees. Fortunately, I was able to put a stop to this. I now look forward to presenting my case in court, where I expect the owner or CEO to answer for these deceptive practices.

If you are considering using Hurricane Digital SEO Brisbane, I strongly urge you to reconsider. I hope this review helps others avoid the costly mistake I made by trusting their false promises.
DARPAN is doing a fantastic job with SEO and Google Ads. Our online presence has improved significantly.
I have been dealing with Aidan and have no complaints at all, he's very switched on, great communication and very good at what he does, highly recommend!

Hurts me to write a bad review but want to warn other people,
I was called by hurricane Digital and ended up speaking to Mitch, Mitch is a incredible salesman and sucked me in with the promised they would get my Name on the first page of Google within 4-6months,
I was then passed on to a account manager,  We were having trouble with google confirming addresses and stuff, Once that was sorted 7 months into my 12 month contract no results at all, no where near the first page, I was met with a lot of excuses like, you don't have enough reviews, its you name thats the issue,
even though a lot of the other plumbers ranking first page only had a couple reviews and at that stage I was 30+ 5 star reviews.

I called up multiple times to speak to Mitch but they won't let you, they just say the only person you can speak to is your account manager

Didn't really hear much from hurricane digital until I started emailing and calling every day trying to get released from my contract, which they said no but they will pause billing and even work for free after the contract is over until I'm at the top page.

They promised within a month I would be ranked first page in 2/10 of my preferred suburbs. well that never happened.

The 12 months is well and truely up with no results.  they are now sending me screen shots of my page at the top of google.
but when I google it myself I'm no where to be seen. Along with these fake screen shots, they want to un pause the billing even though my 12 month contract is over.

I see from their other reviews companies seemed to have has success with hurricane digital.
Simply I have not, so just be careful when signing up for a contract

I'd also like to commend Darpan for his professionalism as the member of the team I dealt with primarily, he was diligent with ensuring to get the best possible result, and an all round gentleman. Thank you Hurricane Digital and Darpan!

DO NOT USE THESE GUYS! They are an absolute nightmare. Stay well clear of these guys, they will take your money and absolutely nothing happens to your profile. They make promises that it takes 3 months for an improvement to be made, then when nothing happens, they change the goal posts to 12 months. I tried to cancel my service after 8 months (at $825 per month!) and they refused and kept charging me. I’ve had a significant downturn in income this year, and coupled with the lack of performance thought it appropriate to cancel the service, but no, they refuse and kept charging me. Heed my warning and stay well clear, they will not help you. Go and get your own reviews and build your own profile, there is nothing that they do that you cannot easily do yourself. It’s also likely that they’ll attempt to have this review removed, here’s hoping it sticks.
Edit in response to Hurricanes comments:
Your 'bespoke' software looks like spam to customers, so no one replied to it. I generate reviews by copying and pasting a direct link from my Google business page, and texting it to my customers.
At no stage did I state that no work has been completed.
There's almost no chance that the posts you generated were unique. Many of the photos were of electrical work conducted overseas. A couple of months ago you posted a photo of santa wearing a toolbelt, demonstrating the use of generic and repeated posts.
I do not get a monthly review. Google notifies me directly of the trend in search results, and it has declined since your involvement.
No noticeable improvement has been made to my search results in the areas which were stated to be targeted. Before engaging your services, I already ranked first in my town.
On the contrary to your statement that I haven't contacted you in some time, it was actually me who wrote the last email to your accounts team. They stated that they could not help me, and I replied requesting that they forward the email to a member of staff that could, and I received no reply.
I do not recall replying in writing that I rejected your discount.
I have written many times to you to cease charging me for services which are not being performed, and at a price that is well above what I can afford, given the sharp decline in business. These are fair reasons.
Really happy with the team, I was in a pickle and Ainslee worked with me to work out the best plan forwarded. Looks like we will be long time clients. Thank you again Ainslee!

We’ve been working with Aiden from Hurricane Digital for the past 6 months on SEO for both our businesses, Alchemist Sheds and Whitsunday Roofing, and the experience has been fantastic.
Aiden has been incredibly responsive, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. He takes the time to explain things clearly and is always proactive with ideas to help improve our online presence. It’s been great having someone who genuinely understands how to help local businesses grow online.
If you’re looking for someone reliable to help with SEO and digital marketing, I’d definitely recommend reaching out to Aiden at Hurricane Digital.
Thanks again for all the support, Aiden!

analysis.summary: Customers overwhelmingly praise specific staff members for tangible improvements in visibility, lead generation, and website performance, though one significant complaint highlights a disconnect between sales promises and actual ROI.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: getting us back on Google where we can actually be seen/found. I am back to getting calls & email inquiries

quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Pricing or About page to justify cost and demonstrate value

quotable_for_redesign.quote: He goes above and beyond, putting in extra work to ensure everything is properly setup.

quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Testimonials section to emphasize customer care and attention to detail

analysis.owner_reply_observations: Replies are not visible in the provided sample data; however, the high volume of specific praise suggests active engagement, while the lack of visible replies to the negative review is a potential risk area.
redesign_hooks: Feature Tracey's quote prominently on the homepage to address the primary pain point of being 'invisible' online.
Use Brady's and Steven's reviews in a 'Results' or 'Case Studies' section to validate the ROI of the investment.
Highlight the specific staff names (Aiden, Nash) in team bios to leverage the personal connection customers feel.
Address the negative review's concern about transparency by adding a 'What to Expect' or 'Deliverables' section to the sales page.
